Notes: This config uses Ctrl-a instead of Ctrl-b
Opens ~/.tmux.conf in $EDITOR and reloads on save/exit
Detach all other clients from same session
Moves all windows to target session
Also available manually with Ctrl-a r
Creates side-by-side panes in current path
Creates stacked panes in current path
Resize by 5 cells; may conflict with Backspace in some terminals
Then use h/j/k/l repeatedly without re-prefixing; q, Esc, or Enter exits; status shows [RESIZE]
Turns current pane into its own window
Vim-style line selection in copy mode
Toggle block selection in copy mode
